item.label: Used to have, but no longer have

custom.eventDescription:
You must go into self-isolation

  • Get the PCR test on day 4 and day 6 after you were last in contact with the infected person. If you cannot get a PCR test on day 6, you can take a rapid test.
  • You can lift your self-isolation if your PCR test on day 4 is negative.
  • If you test positive on one of your tests, you must remain in self-isolation.

Read more on  Sundhedsstyrelsens home page.

No need for self-isolation

You don't need to go into self-isolation. Always remember to follow the Danish Health Authority's good advice to prevent infection and pay particular attention to the development of symptoms.

  • Get tested with a quick test as soon as possible. Then get the PCR test on day 4 and day 6 after you were last in contact with the infected person. If you cannot get a PCR test on day 6, you can take a rapid test.
  • If you develop symptoms of covid-19, you must immediately go into self-isolation and be PCR tested immediately.
  • If you test positive on one of your tests, you must immediately go into self-isolation.

Read more on  Sundhedsstyrelsens home page.
You are in close contact with someone infected with Covid-19
Here you can see when you should have a PCR test
• There is no critical overlap in the period when it was contagious and you were in close contact.

label.id: Have you been closer than 1 meter to the infected person for more than 15 minutes?
Have you had direct physical contact with the infected person?
Do you live with the infected?
On what day did the infected person test positive?
Does the infected person have symptoms?
When was the last time you were with the infected person?
When did the symptoms go away?
When did the infected person develop symptoms?
Have you had the 3rd vaccine shot?
You are not close to contact

labelMapping.labelId: Have you been closer than 1 meter to the infected person for more than 15 minutes?
Have you had direct physical contact with the infected person?
Do you live with the infected?
On what day did the infected person test positive?
Does the infected person have symptoms?
When was the last time you were with the infected person?
When did the symptoms go away?
When did the infected person develop symptoms?
Have you had the 3rd vaccine shot?
You are not close to contact

expression.value: ( If( ((LiveWith = 1) AND (true AND true)) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( (true AND ((PhysicalContactWith = 1) AND true)) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( (true AND (true AND (OneMeter = 1))) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( ((LiveWith = 0) AND ((PhysicalContactWith = 0) AND (OneMeter = 0))) ) THEN ( "no" ) ELSE ( ( If( (true AND (true AND true)) ) THEN ( "retry" ) ELSE ( null ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )

( If( ((Symptoms = 2) AND (((LastContact > (WhenSymptoms - PT48H)) AND (LastContact < (LastSymptoms + PT48H))) AND (true AND (true AND true)))) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( ((Symptoms = 3) AND (((LastContact > (InfectedTestDate - PT48H)) AND (LastContact < (InfectedTestDate + P7D))) AND (true AND (true AND true)))) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( ((Symptoms = 1) AND (((LastContact > (WhenSymptoms - PT48H)) AND (LastContact < (now + PT48H))) AND (true AND (true AND true)))) ) THEN ( "yes" ) ELSE ( ( If( (true AND (true AND (true AND (true AND true)))) ) THEN ( "no" ) ELSE ( null ) ) ) ) ) ) ) )

custom.graphDetails: Get answers to whether you are close contact and what you need to do. By answering questions, you can find out if you are in close contact, if you should go into self-isolation and when you should take a PCR test.
